meaning: adj.无领的,无马轭(或颈圈)的
examples: Originally the collarless shirt and trousers were nondescript, of flannel or wool.
Men wear a collarless short Chinese jacket, long trousers and white or blue headpiece.
One wore a dark baseball cap, a light collarless shirt and a dark-colored jacket.
Instead of a suit and tie, he wears collarless shirts embroidered with Andean Indian designs.
